leakage_controls: TDA latent Cohen's d is recomputed on each training fold only.
Decoder Jacobian reference point is recomputed from each training fold tumor mean only.
Euclidean Welch t-test p-values/ranks are recomputed on each training fold only.
Classifiers are fit on training fold features and evaluated once on held-out fold samples.
Latent_32d baseline uses fixed unsupervised latent coordinates only.
combat_status: The local available expression matrix is already ComBat-corrected by the original preprocessing pipeline. Raw tumor/normal/clinical files required to refit ComBat inside each fold were not present locally, so this run removes the core label-dependent feature-selection leakage but cannot refit ComBat.
